ksa_text: Knowledge of data remediation and recovery procedures, including data breach response workflows, data deletion and sanitization methods, remediation requirements under privacy law, forensic data recovery considerations, and incident documentation standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to AI Red Team Lead scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("privacy law", "data breach"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working AI Red Team Lead self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in AI Red Team Lead work (domain affinity 0.78, 2 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
